esp32_preferences_begin.tooltip: Call Preferences.begin(name, readOnly) to open a namespace in the default NVS partition.

esp32_preferences_begin_partition.tooltip: Call Preferences.begin(name, readOnly, partition_label) to open a namespace in a selected NVS partition.

esp32_preferences_end.tooltip: Call Preferences.end() to close the current namespace.

esp32_preferences_clear.tooltip: Call Preferences.clear() to erase every key in the current namespace.

esp32_preferences_remove.tooltip: Call Preferences.remove(key) to erase one key.

esp32_preferences_put_char.tooltip: Call Preferences.putChar() to write a int8 value.

esp32_preferences_put_uchar.tooltip: Call Preferences.putUChar() to write a uint8 value.

esp32_preferences_put_short.tooltip: Call Preferences.putShort() to write a int16 value.

esp32_preferences_put_ushort.tooltip: Call Preferences.putUShort() to write a uint16 value.

esp32_preferences_put_int.tooltip: Call Preferences.putInt() to write a int32 value.

esp32_preferences_put_uint.tooltip: Call Preferences.putUInt() to write a uint32 value.

esp32_preferences_put_long.tooltip: Call Preferences.putLong() to write a long value.

esp32_preferences_put_ulong.tooltip: Call Preferences.putULong() to write a unsigned long value.

esp32_preferences_put_long64.tooltip: Call Preferences.putLong64() to write a int64 value.

esp32_preferences_put_ulong64.tooltip: Call Preferences.putULong64() to write a uint64 value.

esp32_preferences_put_float.tooltip: Call Preferences.putFloat() to write a float value.

esp32_preferences_put_double.tooltip: Call Preferences.putDouble() to write a double value.

esp32_preferences_put_bool.tooltip: Call Preferences.putBool() to write a boolean value.

esp32_preferences_put_string.tooltip: Call Preferences.putString() to write a string value.

esp32_preferences_put_bytes.tooltip: Call Preferences.putBytes(key, buffer, len) to write a byte buffer; buffer is a raw C++ variable name or expression.

esp32_preferences_get_char.tooltip: Call Preferences.getChar() to read a int8 value, returning the default when the key is missing.

esp32_preferences_get_uchar.tooltip: Call Preferences.getUChar() to read a uint8 value, returning the default when the key is missing.

esp32_preferences_get_short.tooltip: Call Preferences.getShort() to read a int16 value, returning the default when the key is missing.

esp32_preferences_get_ushort.tooltip: Call Preferences.getUShort() to read a uint16 value, returning the default when the key is missing.

esp32_preferences_get_int.tooltip: Call Preferences.getInt() to read a int32 value, returning the default when the key is missing.

esp32_preferences_get_uint.tooltip: Call Preferences.getUInt() to read a uint32 value, returning the default when the key is missing.

esp32_preferences_get_long.tooltip: Call Preferences.getLong() to read a long value, returning the default when the key is missing.

esp32_preferences_get_ulong.tooltip: Call Preferences.getULong() to read a unsigned long value, returning the default when the key is missing.

esp32_preferences_get_long64.tooltip: Call Preferences.getLong64() to read a int64 value, returning the default when the key is missing.

esp32_preferences_get_ulong64.tooltip: Call Preferences.getULong64() to read a uint64 value, returning the default when the key is missing.

esp32_preferences_get_float.tooltip: Call Preferences.getFloat() to read a float value, returning the default when the key is missing.

esp32_preferences_get_double.tooltip: Call Preferences.getDouble() to read a double value, returning the default when the key is missing.

esp32_preferences_get_bool.tooltip: Call Preferences.getBool() to read a boolean value, returning the default when the key is missing.

esp32_preferences_get_string.tooltip: Call Preferences.getString() to read a string value, returning the default when the key is missing.

esp32_preferences_get_bytes.message0: get bytes key %1 into buffer %2 max length %3
esp32_preferences_get_bytes.tooltip: Call Preferences.getBytes(key, buffer, maxLen) and return the number of bytes read.

esp32_preferences_get_string_length.tooltip: Call Preferences.getStringLength(key) to get the stored string length.

esp32_preferences_get_bytes_length.tooltip: Call Preferences.getBytesLength(key) to get the stored byte length.

esp32_preferences_is_key.tooltip: Call Preferences.isKey(key) to check whether a key exists.

esp32_preferences_get_type.tooltip: Call Preferences.getType(key) to return a PreferenceType enum value.

esp32_preferences_type_constant.tooltip: Return a PreferenceType enum constant defined by Preferences.h.

esp32_preferences_free_entries.tooltip: Call Preferences.freeEntries() to get the free-entry count for the default NVS partition.
